---
Title: Education
---

## Undergraduate Studies

[**Lawrence University**]{style="font-size: 1.2em;"} | Appleton, WI | Sept 2022 - June 2026 <br>
*B.A. in Economics*, *Minor in Statistics & Data Science* <br> 
**GPA:** 3.4/4.0

**Data Analytics & ML Coursework:** 

- Statistical Machine Learning
- Data Scientific Programming
- Quantitative Decision Making
- Advanced Data Computing

**Economics & Finance Coursework:**

- Advanced Econometrics and Modelling
- Foundations of Financial Management
- Micro/Macroeconomics
- Fundamentals of Accounting

**Extracurricular:**

- Men's NCAA Fencing Team (2022-2026)
- Lawrence University Investment Club (2026)

---
